steps.title: Mark the possessives
steps.content: The sentence needs possession in two places: the modeling belongs to an astronomer, and the trajectory belongs to the object 2060 Chiron. A grammatically complete phrase must show both relationships before trajectory.

steps.title: Choose the intended possessive
steps.content: A has no possessive marking, C leaves astronomers nonpossessive, and D makes the owner of the modeling plural even though that plural owner is not established in the sentence. The remaining form supplies possessive marking for both modeling and the object's trajectory. The answer is B.
